lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਦਰਿ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੇ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਅਪੁਨੈ ਕੀਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak se dar sobhaavante jo prabh apunai keeo |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone look beautiful in the Court of the Lord, whom the Lord has made His Own. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਚੰਦਉਰੀ ਚਿਤ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਸਖੀਏ ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਦ੍ਰੁਮ ਛਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: harichandauree chit bhram sakhee mrig trisanaa drum chhaaeaa |
lines.english: Maya is a mirage, which deludes the mind, O my companion, like the scent-crazed deer, or the transitory shade of a tree.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੰਚਲਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚਾਲਤੀ ਸਖੀਏ ਅੰਤਿ ਤਜਿ ਜਾਵਤ ਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: chanchal sang na chaalatee sakhee ant taj jaavat maaeaa |
lines.english: Maya is fickle, and does not go with you, O my companion; in the end, it will leave you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨਿ ਧੰਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧ ਜਨ ਸਖੀਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan har saadh jan sakhee naanak jinee naam dhiaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed are the humble, Holy Saints of the Lord, O my companion. O Nanak, they meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਿ ਭੋਗਣ ਅਤਿ ਰੂਪ ਰਸ ਮਾਤੇ ਇਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੂਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ras bhogan at roop ras maate in sang sookh na paaeaa |
lines.english: He may enjoy pleasures and sensual delights with supremely beautiful women, but no one finds peace in this way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਇ ਬਸਹੁ ਵਡਭਾਗਣੀ ਸਖੀਏ ਸੰਤਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jaae basahu vaddabhaaganee sakhee santaa sang samaaeeai |
lines.english: Go, O my very fortunate companion: dwell in the Company of the Saints, and merge with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਜਨਮ ਨ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਨਿਹਚਲੁ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: teh janam na maran na aavan jaanaa nihachal saranee paaeeai |
lines.english: There is no birth or death there, no coming or going in reincarnation, when you enter the Sanctuary of the Eternal Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹ ਦੂਖ ਨ ਭੂਖ ਨ ਰੋਗੁ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: teh dookh na bhookh na rog biaapai charan kamal liv laaeeai |
lines.english: There, neither pain nor hunger nor disease will afflict you; enshrine love for the Lord's Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਬੇਧਿਆ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਰਤੜੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: drisatt dhaar man bedhiaa piaare ratarre sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: Bestowing His Glance of Grace, my Beloved has pierced my mind, and I am intuitively attuned to His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਬਿਛੋਹੁ ਨ ਮੋਹੁ ਬਿਆਪੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: prem bichhohu na mohu biaapai naanak har ek dhiaaeeai |3|
lines.english: Love does not end, and attachment does not grip you, O Nanak, when you meditate on the One Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sej suhaavee sang mil preetam anad mangal gun gaae |
lines.english: My bed is embellished, meeting with my Beloved; in ecstasy and bliss, I sing His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਅਚਰਜੁ ਅਚਰਜ ਸਿਉ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਹਣਾ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥੪॥੨॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak acharaj acharaj siau miliaa kahanaa kachhoo na jaae |4|2|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, the wonder-struck soul blends with the Wonderful Lord; this state cannot be described. ||4||2||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਖੀ ਸਹੇਲੀ ਰਾਮ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਇਛ ਪੁਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sakhee sahelee raam rang raatee man tan ichh pujaae |
lines.english: O my friends and companions, I am imbued with the Lord's Love; the desires of my mind and body are satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: raag bilaaval mahalaa 5 ghar 4 |
lines.english: Raag Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਨਜੁ ਆਪਿ ਬਿਉਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape banaj aap biauhaaraa |1|
lines.english: He Himself is the trade, and He Himself is the trader. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਰੂਪ ਸਗਲੋ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ek roop sagalo paasaaraa |
lines.english: The entire Universe is the form of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤ ਜਤ ਜਾਈਐ ਤਤ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਾਏ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jat jat jaaeeai tat drisattaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Wherever I go, there I see Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੋ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਬਿਰਲੋ ਈ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: aiso giaan biralo ee paae |
lines.english: How rare is that one who is blessed with such spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਰੰਗ ਨਿਰਗੁਨ ਇਕ ਰੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: anik rang niragun ik rangaa |
lines.english: He manifests many forms, while still unmanifest and absolute, and yet He has One Form.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਲੁ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਤਰੰਗਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape jal aap hee tarangaa |2|
lines.english: He Himself is the water, and He Himself is the waves. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਹਿ ਜੋਗ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਜੁਗਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aapeh jog aap hee jugataa |
lines.english: He Himself is the Yoga; He Himself is the Way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਪੂਜਾਰੀ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਦੇਵਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap hee poojaaree aap hee devaa |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the worshipper, and He Himself is the idol. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਆਪਹਿ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap hee mandar aapeh sevaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the temple, and He Himself is selfless service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਉਪਾਵਨ ਆਪਿ ਸਧਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap upaavan aap sadharanaa |
lines.english: He Himself creates, and He Himself supports.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਮੁਕਤਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak ke prabh sad hee mukataa |4|1|6|
lines.english: Nanak's God is forever liberated. ||4||1||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਬਚਨੁ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aapan bachan aap hee karanaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the teaching, and He Himself is the teacher.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰਾਵਨ ਦੋਸੁ ਨ ਲੈਨਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap karaavan dos na lainaa |1|
lines.english: He Himself causes all to act; He takes no blame Himself. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਬਿਭਉ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਜਰਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapan bibhau aap hee jaranaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He Himself is the splendor, and He Himself is the experiencer of it. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਅਛਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਛਲਨਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aap hee achhal na jaaee chhalanaa |2|
lines.english: He Himself is undeceivable; He cannot be deceived. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਮਸਟਿ ਆਪ ਹੀ ਬੁਲਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap hee masatt aap hee bulanaa |
lines.english: He Himself is silent, and He Himself is the speaker.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਗੁਪਤ ਆਪਿ ਪਰਗਟਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aap hee gupat aap paragattanaa |
lines.english: He Himself is hidden, and He Himself is manifest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪ ਹੀ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਆਪਿ ਅਲਿਪਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aap hee ghatt ghatt aap alipanaa |3|
lines.english: He Himself is in each and every heart; He Himself is unattached. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਅਵਿਗਤੁ ਆਪ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਚਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape avigat aap sang rachanaa |
lines.english: He Himself is absolute, and He Himself is with the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਜਚਨਾ ॥੪॥੨॥੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak prabh ke sabh jachanaa |4|2|7|
lines.english: Says Nanak, all are beggars of God. ||4||2||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਲੇ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਜਿਨਹਿ ਬਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhoole maarag jineh bataaeaa |
lines.english: He places the one who strays back on the Path;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਿ ਮਨਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: simar manaa raam naam chitaare |
lines.english: Meditate, contemplate the Name of the Lord, O mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aisaa gur vaddabhaagee paaeaa |1|
lines.english: such a Guru is found by great good fortune. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸਿ ਰਹੇ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bas rahe hiradai gur charan piaare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Beloved Feet of the Guru abide within my heart. ||1||Pause||
